name: Picton ADM General De Fondos S.A - Picton Tpg VIII Fondo De Inversion Fund
summary: Picton ADM General De Fondos S.A - Picton Tpg VIII Fondo De Inversion Fund likely invests in private equity opportunities through a partnership with TPG (Texas Pacific Group). Picton ADM General De Fondos S.A manages the fund. The fund aims to generate returns by investing in a diversified portfolio of private equity investments managed by TPG.
